text: IRANIAN DRONE STRIKES KUWAITI TANKER AT DUBAI PORT: IRGC drone hits fully laden Kuwaiti VLCC 'Al-Salmi' at anchor in Dubai port area just after midnight — fire breaks out, 24 crew safely evacuated, oil spill risk; IRGC claims ship carried Israeli-linked flag; Chinese-flagged vessels transit Hormuz unopposed — selective blockade continues; Brent crude expected to spike on tanker attack

sources.name: Bloomberg — Iran Strikes Kuwait Oil Tanker in Dubai Port
Al Jazeera liveblog — Kuwaiti tanker hit

text: 4 IDF SOLDIERS KILLED IN LEBANON + HAIFA REFINERY HIT + 170 TEHRAN TARGETS: 4 IDF Nahal Brigade soldiers killed in Hezbollah ambush in south Lebanon (anti-tank missile during evacuation); missile strikes Haifa Bazan refinery gasoline tank — fire contained, 2 injured; IDF completes 170-target strike wave across Tehran hitting plutonium facility, IRGC university, missile sites; orphanage strike in Alborz kills 2; Israel shifts to economic targets as military targets near exhaustion

sources.name: Times of Israel — Four soldiers killed in Lebanon

text: IRAN MISSILE SALVO AT JERUSALEM + WSJ: TRUMP MAY END WAR WITHOUT REOPENING HORMUZ: Iranian missile salvo at 5:30 AM local hits Jerusalem/central Israel — intercepted over West Bank, no injuries; WSJ: Trump tells aides willing to end military campaign even if Hormuz stays closed — would push reopening to later date; assessed Hormuz operation extends beyond 4-6 week timeline; Brent dips to $111.55 in early March 31 trading on WSJ report

sources.name: Haaretz — Trump willing to end war without reopening Hormuz

text: HEGSETH INVESTMENT SCANDAL + PENTAGON BRIEFING: FT: Defense Sec. Hegseth's Morgan Stanley broker attempted multimillion-dollar defense ETF investment (RTX, Lockheed, Northrop) BEFORE Iran war began — trade didn't execute; Pentagon's Parnell: 'entirely false and fabricated'; Hegseth + Gen. Caine hold first Pentagon briefing in 2 weeks; Pakistan FM Dar in Beijing — China's Wang Yi backs mediation; Gulf states privately want war to continue until regime change (WSJ)

text: IRANIAN CLUSTER MUNITION HITS CENTRAL ISRAEL: Missile with ~24 bomblets penetrates defenses over Bnei Brak, Ramat Gan, Petah Tikva — 23-year-old moderately injured, 11 lightly wounded including 6 children; cars ablaze, workshop fire; HRW condemns 'unlawful cluster munition strikes'

HRW — Iran Unlawful Cluster Munition Strikes

text: 3 UNIFIL PEACEKEEPERS KILLED — FIRST FATALITIES: Three Indonesian peacekeepers killed in two separate incidents in south Lebanon within 24 hours; France seeks emergency UNSC meeting; IDF says investigating; origin of both attacks unclear

IRGC COMMANDER KILLED + SAUDI INTERCEPTS: Brig. Gen. Hassanzadeh (Rasul-Allah Corps, Tehran security) killed in Israeli strike; Gen. Zakariaei dies of March 28 wounds; Saudi intercepts 10 drones + 8 ballistic missiles overnight; drone debris hits 6 houses in Al-Kharj

IRAN PARLIAMENT APPROVES HORMUZ TOLL PLAN: Rial-denominated tolls, bans US/Israeli vessels + ships from sanctioning nations; Ghalibaf warns of US plan to seize Iranian island; potential revenue $600-800M/month; Rubio: 'illegal, unacceptable, dangerous'

sources.name: BNN Bloomberg — Iran Hormuz toll plan

text: RUBIO: WAR 'WEEKS NOT MONTHS' + POPE CONDEMNS WAR: Rubio tells Al Jazeera Hormuz reopens 'one way or another'; confirms Iran backchannel via intermediaries; Pope Leo Palm Sunday: 'God rejects war — no one can use Him to justify war'; FDD publishes counter-argument citing Just War doctrine

GAS CROSSES $4.00 + KNESSET RECORD BUDGET: AAA national avg $4.02/gal — first time since Aug 2022, up $1.04 in one month; Knesset approves $45.8B defense budget (record); Brent $112.90/bbl (+41%); WTI $102.08; S&P 500 posts worst March since 2022 — $2.7T wiped
